response:
Emily collected 24 blueberries. David collected 15 more blueberries than Emily, so he collected 24 + 15 = 39 blueberries. David also collected three times as many as Sophia, so Sophia collected 39 / 3 = 13 blueberries. Together, Emily, David, and Sophia collected 24 + 39 + 13 = 76 blueberries.  

They used their blueberries to make muffins. One batch of muffins required 9 blueberries, so they made 76 / 9 = 8 batches. Each batch was sold for $5, so they earned 8 * 5 = $40.  

The total amount of money they made from the blueberries they collected is $40.  

***  

They collected a total of 76 blueberries. They made 8 batches of muffins, each sold for $5, so they earned $40.  

***  

The final amount of money they made from the blueberries they collected is $40.  

***  

Youth
